<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test-test]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default_1_0_0]
<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>    version   : <{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>"1.0.0"<{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>

<{%reset%}>        [id=actual-id]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resB]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        [provider=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default_1_0_0::90897746-1448-4730-9b52-7532af38793d]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        foo: <{%reset%}><{%reset%}>"bar"<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>

    <{%fg 2%}>+ 1 created<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>= 1 imported<{%reset%}>
    <{%bold%}>2 changes<{%reset%}>
